Home.metaTitle: LAZIRON — Sheet & Tube Metal Laser Cutting Machines
Home.metaDescription: Fiber laser cutting machines for sheet and tube metal. Industrial quality at an affordable price.
Home.heroTitle: Sheet & tube metal laser cutting machines
Home.heroSubtitle: High-precision cutting solutions for metal sheets and profiles: high productivity and low operating costs.
Home.heroTagline: You pay for the technology, not the name.
Home.featuresSubtitle: Industrial performance with no compromise on price.
Home.feature1Desc: State-of-the-art fiber laser sources for clean, repeatable cuts.
Home.feature2Desc: Fast cutting speeds that reduce production time and increase output.
Home.feature3Desc: Low energy consumption and minimal maintenance for a low total cost.
Home.feature4Desc: Extended coverage on the equipment and critical components, for a worry-free investment.
Home.productsSubtitle: Machines built for cutting sheet and tube metal.
Home.ctaText: Tell us what you cut and we'll come back with a tailored configuration and quote.
Home.aboutTitle: Industrial quality, at the lowest price in Romania
Home.aboutText: We are a Romanian team that brings laser cutting machines straight from the factory, without middlemen and without the markup of expensive brands. You pay for the technology, not the name on the cover. We help you choose the configuration, install it, train your team and handle service, all in your language.
Home.offerText: We are sure our prices are the lowest. If you find the same machine cheaper elsewhere, you get an extra 5-10% discount from us. That is how confident we are in the LAZIRON offer.
Home.applicationsSubtitle: Where LAZIRON machines deliver the best results.
Home.laserTitle: Laser technology, at a fair price
Home.laserSubtitle: The same components the major manufacturers use, in a machine any serious workshop can afford. You pay for the technology, not for the name on the cover.
Home.customTitle: Can't find what you need? We'll find it for you.
Home.customText: Tell us what machine you need, even if it isn't listed on the site. Fill in the form with your requirement and we'll source the right equipment and come back with an offer.

Products.metaDescription: The LAZIRON range of laser cutting machines for sheet and tube metal.
Products.title: Products
Products.subtitle: Industrial quality at an affordable price. A full range of laser machines for sheet, tube, welding and cleaning, chosen for workshops that don't want a huge investment.
Products.empty: No products are available at the moment.

ProductDetail.ctaText: Contact us for a personalized quote and full technical details.

Origin.title: Technology from China, full support in Romania
Origin.slogan: Industrial quality at an affordable price.
Origin.text: We bring laser cutting machines made in China to Romania, built with the same components the major manufacturers use. You pay for technology, not for an expensive name. We handle shipping, commissioning, training and service, all in your language.
Origin.point1Desc: Efficient manufacturing in China, without the European brand markup. You invest in the technology, not in a costly logo.
Origin.point2Desc: A local team for installation, training and fast service, with a 60-month warranty and spare parts available in Romania.
Origin.point3Desc: Free inspection before delivery and CE-certified components built to international standards.

Industry.metaDescription: Laser cutting solutions for various industries: automotive, metal construction, furniture, agriculture and more.
Industry.title: Industry Solutions
Industry.subtitle: Verified industrial quality for any industry, at a price any serious workshop can afford. Local support, warranty and spare parts available.
Industry.item1Desc: Metal components and sub-assemblies with tight tolerances for the automotive sector.
Industry.item2Desc: Profiles, beams and structures cut quickly and precisely for construction.
Industry.item3Desc: Decorative and functional parts for furniture and interior design.
Industry.item4Desc: Rugged components for agricultural machinery and equipment.
Industry.item5Desc: 3D letters, logos and decorative metal elements.
Industry.item6Desc: On-demand cutting services for workshops and manufacturers.
Industry.laserTitle: What a LAZIRON laser can do
Industry.laserSubtitle: Four industrial operations delivered by the same fiber laser technology, with precision and repeatability.
Industry.laserAnim1Desc: Plates and profiles with clean, burr-free edges, ready to assemble.
Industry.laserAnim2Desc: Round, square and rectangular tubes, drilled and cut at any angle.
Industry.laserAnim3Desc: Fine, strong seams for metal assemblies, with minimal thermal distortion.
Industry.laserAnim4Desc: Removes rust, paint or oxides with no solvents and no damage to the material.
Industry.laserPitch1Title: Pay for the technology, not the name.
Industry.laserPitch1Text: A Romanian team, hand-picked machines and a fair price. Industrial quality without a huge investment.
Industry.laserPitch2Text: Steady productivity at an investment any serious workshop can afford.
Industry.laserPitch3Text: Fine seams with minimal heat distortion. Warranty and service in your language, from the local team.
Industry.laserPitch4Text: Skip the consumables and extra labour. A fast, accessible investment, backed locally by the LAZIRON team.

Contact.metaDescription: Contact the LAZIRON team for quotes and technical information.
Contact.title: Contact us
Contact.subtitle: Tell us what you need and we will get back to you with a personalized quote.
Contact.lead: Our laser cutting machines offer the lowest price for the same configuration and the highest configuration for the same price. We have a professional technical and after-sales team, providing 24/7 service from production to after-sales, so you can produce without worries.
Contact.formSuccess: Thank you! Your message has been sent. We will get back to you shortly.

About.metaDescription: LAZIRON brings laser cutting, bending, welding and cleaning machines at an affordable price, with full local support.
About.title: About us
About.subtitle: Who we are and why you can trust LAZIRON.
About.subtitleTagline: Industrial quality at an affordable price. You pay for the technology, not the name.
About.heading: Bringing industrial performance closer to your workshop
About.lead: Industrial quality at an affordable price.
About.body1: LAZIRON is a Romanian project that brings laser cutting, bending, welding and cleaning machines straight from the factory. We pick equipment built with the same components the major manufacturers use and offer it at a fair price, without the markup of expensive brands.
About.body2: We work transparently: we explain exactly what you are buying, help you choose the right configuration and stay with you after delivery, with training and service in your language.
About.point1Desc: We speak the same language and understand what local workshops really need.
About.point2Desc: Technical assistance, training and fast service, in your language.
About.point3Desc: Extended coverage on the equipment and access to spare parts when you need them.
About.point4Desc: See the machine tested on your material, live or on site, before we ship it.
About.point5Desc: Laser sources and components built to international standards.
About.point6Desc: If you find the same machine cheaper elsewhere, you get a 5-10% discount from us.
About.ctaText: Write to us and we'll come back with details, configurations and a tailored quote.

CookieBanner.title: We use cookies

privacy.metaDescription: How LAZIRON handles your personal data, in line with the GDPR.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.lead: We respect the privacy of your data and comply with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR).

sections.heading: Data controller
sections.body: The laziron.com website is operated by LAZIRON, with office at Laziron Office, Kerry Plaza Tower 2, No. 1 Zhong Xin Fourth Road, Futian District, Shenzhen, Guangdong 518046, China. For any request about your personal data, contact us through the form on the Contact page.

sections.heading: Personal data we collect
sections.body: We collect: (a) data you submit through the contact form (name, company, message and any other details you choose to provide); (b) technical data (IP address, user-agent, access logs) recorded automatically by our hosting provider for security and diagnostics; (c) preferences (selected language) stored in an essential cookie. We do not collect special category data (health, political opinions, biometric data, etc.).

sections.heading: Purposes and legal basis
sections.body: We process your data to: reply to requests and send tailored quotes (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR — pre-contractual measures); perform contracts, including delivery, installation, warranty and service (Art. 6(1)(b)); secure the site and prevent fraud (Art. 6(1)(f) — legitimate interest); comply with fiscal and accounting legal obligations (Art. 6(1)(c)); send marketing communications, where applicable, based on your consent (Art. 6(1)(a)), which you may withdraw at any time.

sections.heading: Retention period
sections.body: Form contact data is kept for as long as there is an active interest, but no more than 3 years from the last interaction. Contractual documents and invoices are kept for 10 years per applicable accounting law. Technical logs are kept for up to 12 months.

sections.heading: Who we share data with
sections.body: Data may be shared with: our hosting and infrastructure provider (Vercel Inc., USA), the service used to deliver forms, logistics partners for fulfilling deliveries, public authorities when required by law. All our processors are contractually bound to comply with the GDPR.

sections.heading: Transfers outside the EEA
sections.body: Since we operate in both the European Union and China, your data may be transferred to countries outside the European Economic Area. In such cases, we make sure the transfer is based on the Standard Contractual Clauses approved by the European Commission or other appropriate safeguards under Art. 46 GDPR.

sections.heading: Your rights
sections.body: Under GDPR, you have the right: to access your data; to rectify inaccurate data; to erasure (right to be forgotten); to restriction of processing; to object to processing based on legitimate interest or direct marketing; to data portability; to withdraw consent at any time, without affecting the lawfulness of prior processing. To exercise these rights, contact us through the form on the Contact page.

sections.heading: Complaint to authority
sections.body: You have the right to lodge a complaint with the Romanian National Supervisory Authority for Personal Data Processing (ANSPDCP, www.dataprotection.ro) or with the supervisory authority in your country of residence.

sections.heading: Data security
sections.body: We apply reasonable technical and organisational measures to protect data: TLS encryption for all transmissions, restricted database access, audit logs, backups. No internet transmission method is 100% secure, but we make every reasonable effort to protect your data.

sections.heading: Policy changes
sections.body: We may update this policy to reflect technical, legal or operational changes. The latest version is always available at this address; continuing to use the site after a change means you accept the new version.

terms.metaDescription: The terms governing the use of the LAZIRON website and services.
terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.lead: The terms governing the use of the laziron.com website and LAZIRON services.

sections.heading: Identification details
sections.body: The laziron.com website is operated by LAZIRON, with office at Laziron Office, Kerry Plaza Tower 2, Futian District, Shenzhen, China.

sections.heading: About the site
sections.body: The laziron.com website presents the LAZIRON range of machines and offers a contact channel for quotes. The content is informative and is not a binding offer; final prices, lead times and configurations are set through a written tailored quote.

sections.heading: Orders and payments
sections.body: Orders are confirmed by a written offer accepted by both parties. Payment follows the terms of the proforma invoice, before delivery, unless otherwise agreed. We accept bank transfer and other methods stated on the invoice.

sections.heading: User rights and obligations
sections.body: You agree to use the site in good faith, without attempting to affect its security or operation. We reserve the right to restrict access in case of abusive or fraudulent use.

sections.heading: Limitation of liability
sections.body: The website content is provided "as is", without implied warranties. LAZIRON is not liable for indirect losses caused by incorrect use of the information or equipment. Contractual liability is limited to the value of the contract concluded, within the limits of the law.

sections.heading: Intellectual property
sections.body: All images, texts, trademarks and the LAZIRON logo are the property of the company and protected by copyright and industrial property law. Any unauthorised use is prohibited.

sections.heading: Governing law
sections.body: These terms are governed by Romanian law. Disputes are settled amicably or, failing that, by the competent courts in Romania. For consumers, the additional rights under consumer protection legislation apply.

cookies.metaDescription: How we use cookies on laziron.com.
cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.lead: How we use cookies on laziron.com.

sections.heading: What cookies are
sections.body: Cookies are small text files stored by the browser on your device when you visit a website. They let the site remember certain information about your preferences between visits.

sections.heading: Types of cookies
sections.body: Cookies can be: essential (needed for the site to work), preferences (remember choices such as language), statistics (measure anonymous traffic) and marketing (track activity for advertising). On laziron.com we use only cookies from the first two categories.

sections.heading: Cookies we use
sections.body: We use a single cookie: NEXT_LOCALE (essential / preferences), which remembers your preferred language; duration: 1 year; issuer: laziron.com. We do not use Google Analytics, Facebook pixels, remarketing cookies or other third-party tracking tools.

sections.heading: How to control cookies
sections.body: You can accept, refuse or delete cookies from your browser settings. For details, check the documentation of the browser you use (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge). Note that deleting NEXT_LOCALE will make the site use automatic language detection again on your next visit.

sections.heading: Changes
sections.body: We may update this policy to reflect technical or legal changes. The current version is always available at this address.

returns.metaDescription: Return conditions for LAZIRON machines and services.
returns.title: Return Policy
returns.lead: Return conditions for LAZIRON machines and services.

sections.heading: Made-to-order products
sections.body: LAZIRON machines are built to order in the specific configuration contracted, which means they fall under the exception to the 14-day right of return set out in Art. 16(c) of Directive 2011/83/EU on consumer rights (customised goods).

sections.heading: Manufacturing defects
sections.body: If the equipment shows non-conformities on delivery, please notify us within 7 calendar days of receipt at the latest, through the contact form, with photos and a description of the issue. We will resolve the case through repair, replacement or financial settlement, per the Warranty Policy.

sections.heading: Order cancellation
sections.body: Cancellation before production starts has no penalty. After production begins, contractual conditions apply, with deductions proportional to the production stage at the time of cancellation.

sections.heading: Procedure
sections.body: For any request related to returns or non-conformity, contact us through the form on the Contact page. We respond within 5 working days at the latest.

shipping.metaDescription: Lead times and shipping conditions for LAZIRON machines.
shipping.title: Shipping Policy
shipping.lead: How we ship the machines and what the lead times are.

sections.heading: Lead times
sections.body: Standard lead time is 45-90 working days from order confirmation and advance payment, depending on the configuration and component availability. Indicative lead times are confirmed in the written offer.

sections.heading: Transport
sections.body: Delivery is DAP (Delivered at Place) at the buyer's site stated in the contract. We arrange sea, road or combined transport; costs are included in the quote or invoiced separately, as the case may be.

sections.heading: Goods receipt
sections.body: Upon receipt, please check the condition of packaging and equipment. Any visible damage must be recorded in the receipt protocol and notified within 7 calendar days.

sections.heading: Installation and commissioning
sections.body: Installation, commissioning and operator training are optional services, contracted separately. They are delivered at the buyer's site by our technical team or authorised partners.

warranty.title: Warranty Policy
warranty.lead: Extended 60-month commercial warranty for LAZIRON equipment.

sections.heading: Coverage
sections.body: We offer a 60-month commercial warranty on the machine body and critical mechanical components (frame, guides, motors, ball screws). The laser source, cutting head and CNC control system are covered by the original manufacturers' warranties, per their terms.

sections.heading: What is covered
sections.body: Manufacturing defects and components that fail under normal use are covered free of charge, including service labour in Romania. Original spare parts are supplied throughout the warranty period.

sections.heading: What is not covered
sections.body: Failures caused by incorrect use, impacts, electrical overvoltages, unauthorised interventions, lack of recommended periodic maintenance, unapproved consumables or improper environmental conditions (humidity, excessive dust) are not covered.

sections.heading: Warranty procedure
sections.body: To activate the warranty, contact us through the contact form with the machine serial number, the purchase invoice and a description of the issue. Average response time in Romania is 48-72 working hours.

sections.heading: Technical support
sections.body: The LAZIRON team provides free technical support for the entire equipment lifetime, through the contact form, whether or not the machine is still under warranty.

Footer.tagline: Industrial quality at an affordable price.
